sentences.target: An der Mauer ist ein feuchter Fleck.
sentences.reading: /an deːɐ̯ ˈmaʊ̯ɐ ɪst aɪ̯n ˈfɔɪ̯çtɐ flɛk/

translations.de: An der Mauer ist ein feuchter Fleck.
translations.ipa: /an deːɐ̯ ˈmaʊ̯ɐ ɪst aɪ̯n ˈfɔɪ̯çtɐ flɛk/
translations.en: There’s a damp spot on the wall.
translations.es: Hay una mancha de humedad en la pared.
translations.fr: Il y a une tache d'humidité sur le mur.
translations.it: C'è una macchia di umidità sul muro.
translations.pt: Há uma mancha de umidade na parede.
translations.vi: Trên tường có một vệt ẩm ướt.
translations.nl: Er zit een vochtplek op de muur.
translations.hi: दीवार पर नमी का दाग है.
translations.el: Υπάρχει ένας λεκές υγρασίας στον τοίχο.
translations.nb: Det er en fuktflekk på veggen.
translations.sv: Det finns en fuktfläck på väggen.
translations.ro: Este o pată de umezeală pe perete.
translations.da: Der er en fugtplet på væggen.
translations.ja: 壁に湿ったシミがある。

tokens.explanation: Preposition expressing static location at a boundary/surface; governs dative here.
Definite article, dative feminine singular, agreeing with Mauer under the dative selected by 'an' (location).
Common noun, feminine; head of the prepositional phrase (dative singular) indicating location.
Finite copular auxiliary (3rd person singular, present) linking subject and predicate.
Indefinite article, nominative masculine singular, part of the subject noun phrase.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Fleck'; mixed inflection (-er) due to preceding 'ein'; nominative masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine; head of the subject NP in nominative singular.

sentences.target: Ich lehne mich kurz gegen die Mauer.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈleːnə mɪç kʊrts ˈɡeːɡən diː ˈmaʊ̯ɐ/

translations.de: Ich lehne mich kurz gegen die Mauer.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈleːnə mɪç kʊrts ˈɡeːɡən diː ˈmaʊ̯ɐ/
translations.en: I’m leaning against the wall for a moment.
translations.es: Me apoyo un momento en la pared.
translations.fr: Je m'appuie un instant contre le mur.
translations.it: Mi appoggio un attimo al muro.
translations.ru: Я на минутку прислонюсь к стене.
translations.pt: Vou me encostar na parede por um instante.
translations.vi: Tôi tựa vào tường một lát.
translations.nl: Ik leun even tegen de muur.
translations.uk: Я на мить притулюся до стіни.
translations.hi: मैं थोड़ी देर दीवार से टिक जाता हूँ.
translations.pl: Oprę się na chwilę o ścianę.
translations.nb: Jeg lener meg et øyeblikk mot veggen.
translations.sv: Jag lutar mig mot väggen en stund.
translations.ro: Mă sprijin de perete pentru o clipă.
translations.cs: Na chvilku se opřu o zeď.
translations.da: Jeg læner mig et øjeblik op ad muren.
translations.ja: ちょっと壁にもたれるよ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, finite (1st person singular, present); used reflexively with 'mich' in this posture meaning.
Reflexive personal pronoun, accusative 1st person singular; required by reflexive use of 'sich lehnen'.
Adverb modifying the verb phrase, indicating short duration.
Preposition meaning physical contact/direction 'against'; governs accusative.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular, agreeing with 'Mauer' as object of 'gegen'.
Common noun, feminine; complement of the preposition 'gegen' in accusative.

sentences.target: Der kleine Hund bellt hinter der Mauer.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ ˈklaɪ̯nə hʊnt bɛlt ˈhɪntɐ deːɐ̯ ˈmaʊ̯ɐ/

translations.de: Der kleine Hund bellt hinter der Mauer.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ ˈklaɪ̯nə hʊnt bɛlt ˈhɪntɐ deːɐ̯ ˈmaʊ̯ɐ/
translations.en: The small dog is barking behind the wall.
translations.es: El perrito ladra detrás del muro.
translations.fr: Le petit chien aboie derrière le mur.
translations.it: Il cagnolino abbaia dietro il muro.
translations.ko: 작은 강아지가 담장 뒤에서 짖고 있어요.
translations.pt: O cachorrinho está latindo atrás do muro.
translations.vi: Con chó nhỏ đang sủa phía sau bức tường.
translations.nl: Het kleine hondje blaft achter de muur.
translations.hu: A kiskutya a fal mögött ugat.
translations.hi: छोटा कुत्ता दीवार के पीछे भौंक रहा है.
translations.el: Το μικρό σκυλάκι γαβγίζει πίσω από τον τοίχο.
translations.nb: Den lille hunden bjeffer bak muren.
translations.id: Anjing kecil menggonggong di balik tembok.
translations.sv: Den lilla hunden skäller bakom muren.
translations.da: Den lille hund bjæffer bag muren.
translations.ja: 小さな犬が塀の向こうで吠えている。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular, marking the subject noun 'Hund'.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Hund'; weak inflection (-e) after definite article; nominative masculine singular.
Common noun, masculine; head of the subject NP in nominative singular.
Main verb, finite (3rd person singular, present); predicate of the clause.
Preposition expressing static location 'behind'; governs dative in local sense.
Definite article, dative feminine singular, agreeing with 'Mauer' after 'hinter' (location).
Common noun, feminine; complement/head of the prepositional phrase in dative.

sentences.target: Wir streichen die Mauer morgen mit hellblauer Farbe.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈʃtraɪ̯çən diː ˈmaʊ̯ɐ ˈmɔʁɡən mɪt ˈhɛlˌblaʊ̯ɐ ˈfaʁbə/

translations.de: Wir streichen die Mauer morgen mit hellblauer Farbe.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈʃtraɪ̯çən diː ˈmaʊ̯ɐ ˈmɔʁɡən mɪt ˈhɛlˌblaʊ̯ɐ ˈfaʁbə/
translations.en: We’re painting the wall tomorrow with light blue paint.
translations.es: Mañana pintamos la pared de azul claro.
translations.fr: Demain, on peint le mur en bleu clair.
translations.it: Domani dipingiamo il muro di azzurro chiaro.
translations.ko: 우리는 내일 벽을 연한 하늘색으로 칠해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们明天把墙刷成淡蓝色。
translations.yue: 我哋聽日將牆油成淡藍色。
translations.ru: Завтра мы покрасим стену в светло-голубой цвет.
translations.pt: Amanhã vamos pintar a parede de azul claro.
translations.he: מחר אנחנו צובעים את הקיר בכחול בהיר.
translations.vi: Ngày mai chúng tôi sẽ sơn bức tường màu xanh nhạt.
translations.ar: غداً سنطلي الجدار باللون الأزرق الفاتح.
translations.nl: Morgen verven we de muur lichtblauw.
translations.uk: Завтра ми пофарбуємо стіну у блідо-блакитний колір.
translations.hi: हम कल दीवार को हल्के नीले रंग से रंगेंगे.
translations.el: Αύριο θα βάψουμε τον τοίχο ανοιχτό μπλε.
translations.nb: I morgen maler vi muren lyseblå.
translations.id: Besok kami akan mengecat tembok dengan warna biru muda.
translations.sv: I morgon målar vi muren ljusblå.
translations.ro: Mâine vopsim zidul în albastru deschis.
translations.cs: Zítra zeď natřeme světle modrou barvou.
translations.da: I morgen maler vi muren lyseblå.
translations.ja: 明日、壁を水色に塗ります。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the clause.
Main verb, finite (1st person plural, present); transitive usage meaning 'to paint'.
Definite article, accusative feminine singular, marking 'Mauer' as direct object.
Common noun, feminine; direct object of 'streichen' (accusative singular).
Temporal adverb indicating time of the action.
Preposition meaning 'with/by means of'; governs dative indicating instrument/material.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Farbe'; strong inflection (-er) because there is no article; dative feminine singular after 'mit'.
Common noun, feminine; complement of 'mit' in dative singular, indicating the material/means.

es: Hay una mancha de humedad en la pared.
Me apoyo un momento en la pared.
El perrito ladra detrás del muro.
Mañana pintamos la pared de azul claro.
fr: Il y a une tache d'humidité sur le mur.
Je m'appuie un instant contre le mur.
Le petit chien aboie derrière le mur.
Demain, on peint le mur en bleu clair.
it: C'è una macchia di umidità sul muro.
Mi appoggio un attimo al muro.
Il cagnolino abbaia dietro il muro.
Domani dipingiamo il muro di azzurro chiaro.
ko: 작은 강아지가 담장 뒤에서 짖고 있어요.
우리는 내일 벽을 연한 하늘색으로 칠해요.
zh-Hans: 我们明天把墙刷成淡蓝色。
yue: 我哋聽日將牆油成淡藍色。
ru: Я на минутку прислонюсь к стене.
Завтра мы покрасим стену в светло-голубой цвет.
pt: Há uma mancha de umidade na parede.
Vou me encostar na parede por um instante.
O cachorrinho está latindo atrás do muro.
Amanhã vamos pintar a parede de azul claro.
he: מחר אנחנו צובעים את הקיר בכחול בהיר.
vi: Trên tường có một vệt ẩm ướt.
Tôi tựa vào tường một lát.
Con chó nhỏ đang sủa phía sau bức tường.
Ngày mai chúng tôi sẽ sơn bức tường màu xanh nhạt.
ar: غداً سنطلي الجدار باللون الأزرق الفاتح.
nl: Er zit een vochtplek op de muur.
Ik leun even tegen de muur.
Het kleine hondje blaft achter de muur.
Morgen verven we de muur lichtblauw.
uk: Я на мить притулюся до стіни.
Завтра ми пофарбуємо стіну у блідо-блакитний колір.
hu: A kiskutya a fal mögött ugat.
hi: दीवार पर नमी का दाग है.
मैं थोड़ी देर दीवार से टिक जाता हूँ.
छोटा कुत्ता दीवार के पीछे भौंक रहा है.
हम कल दीवार को हल्के नीले रंग से रंगेंगे.
pl: Oprę się na chwilę o ścianę.
el: Υπάρχει ένας λεκές υγρασίας στον τοίχο.
Το μικρό σκυλάκι γαβγίζει πίσω από τον τοίχο.
Αύριο θα βάψουμε τον τοίχο ανοιχτό μπλε.

Jeg lener meg et øyeblikk mot veggen.
Den lille hunden bjeffer bak muren.
I morgen maler vi muren lyseblå.
id: Anjing kecil menggonggong di balik tembok.
Besok kami akan mengecat tembok dengan warna biru muda.
sv: Det finns en fuktfläck på väggen.
Jag lutar mig mot väggen en stund.
Den lilla hunden skäller bakom muren.
I morgon målar vi muren ljusblå.
ro: Este o pată de umezeală pe perete.
Mă sprijin de perete pentru o clipă.
Mâine vopsim zidul în albastru deschis.
cs: Na chvilku se opřu o zeď.
Zítra zeď natřeme světle modrou barvou.
da: Der er en fugtplet på væggen.
Jeg læner mig et øjeblik op ad muren.
Den lille hund bjæffer bag muren.
I morgen maler vi muren lyseblå.

ちょっと壁にもたれるよ。
小さな犬が塀の向こうで吠えている。
明日、壁を水色に塗ります。
